TREASURY.label: Treasury and risk management
TREASURY.focus: Treasury postings, cash management, and risk processing incidents.
guidance: Validate the bank, market data, or approval dependency before changing treasury configuration.

Z_EWM_HUB.label: Customer EWM Hub
guidance: Validate the warehouse task boundary and queue ownership before replaying logistics messages.

OUTBOUND.label: Outbound warehouse execution
OUTBOUND.focus: Picking, staging, loading, and outbound delivery execution.
guidance: Check the delivery document and queue handoff before reprocessing warehouse tasks.
